concerns.sentence: There is a documented other specified procedure as the cause of abnormal reaction of patient, or of later complication, without mention of misadventure at time of procedure [E:cond:13].
concerns.reason: This sentence uses verbatim ICD-10 coding language which is clinically opaque and potentially misleading in a summary.

recommended_revisions.original: There is a documented other specified procedure as the cause of abnormal reaction of patient, or of later complication, without mention of misadventure at time of procedure [E:cond:13].
recommended_revisions.suggested: The patient experienced a complication following a specified procedure [E:cond:13].
recommended_revisions.reason: Simplifies overly technical coding terminology into a clear clinical statement.
